task_completion.description: Navigate to the Upload users page in Moodle
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Moodle interface should be visible, specifically on the 'Site administration' > 'Users' > 'Accounts' > 'Upload users' page.

task_completion.description: Select the correct CSV file for upload
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'new_staff_upload.csv' should be visible in the file picker or drag-and-drop file area on the Upload users page.

task_completion.description: Configure upload to add new users only
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the upload settings/preview page, the 'Upload type' dropdown must be set to 'Add new only, skip existing users'.

task_completion.description: Configure password requirements and disable forced changes
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the upload settings, 'New user password' must be set to 'Field required in file' and 'Force password change' must be set to 'None'.

The 'Upload users results' page should show successful creation of the users (tnguyen, rkapoor, lchen, mhernandez, sproctor, jokwu, kfischer, dpatel) with a summary indicating users were created and 0 errors.

task_completion.description: Verify the 5 specific staff members are enrolled in BIO101
task_completion.visual_evidence: The upload results page should show successful enrollment in 'BIO101' for tnguyen, rkapoor, lchen, mhernandez, and sproctor. Alternatively, the BIO101 'Participants' page should list these 5 users as enrolled.

integrity.description: Agent used the Moodle web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the Moodle GUI, not terminal commands or database scripts executing the user creation.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Moodle application
integrity.visual_evidence: The Moodle interface should be fully rendered in a browser, not a text editor modifying Moodle PHP files or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply echo success messages
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not just show echo or print commands outputting 'Users created' or 'Enrolled in BIO101'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The CSV file '/home/ga/Documents/new_staff_upload.csv' contains exactly 8 users: tnguyen, rkapoor, lchen, mhernandez, sproctor, jokwu, kfischer, dpatel. The 5 users that must be enrolled in BIO101 ('Introduction to Biology') are: tnguyen, rkapoor, lchen, mhernandez, sproctor. The 3 users that should NOT be enrolled are: jokwu, kfischer, dpatel.
